title: 3pk Bella Linda Skin Care Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion for Hydration 6.5oz
description:

While the journey to hydrated skin can be expensive, time-consuming and tricky to balance with other facial and skincare products, the Bella Linda Skin Care Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion for Hydration is all but those things: it’s economical, absorbs quickly into the skin not leaving a greasy residue and boasts a simple formula with great results. While recommended as a facial moisturizer for any skin type, it can be used as a body lotion, neck lotion, anti-aging cream or night cream as part of your overall skincare routine.

Key Features

  • SKIN CARE HYDRATION: There are hundreds of facial moisturizers on the market but Bella Linda Skin Care Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion for Hydration boasts a simple formula with great results; while recommended as a facial moisturizer for any skin type, it can be used a body lotion, neck lotion, anti aging cream or night cream as part of your overall skin care routine
  • FAST DRYING FORMULA: Quickly penetrating layers of skin for clean hydration, the lotion is light and non-greasy; a great add on to your morning routine or post shower, fitness, beauty, makeup or wellness regimen as it will dry within minutes of application
  • MINIMAL FRAGRANCE: Given the amount of grooming products we use on a daily basis like makeup, mouthwash, sunscreen, perfume and more, many of which can have a strong and lingering fragrance, this facial moisturizer is lightweight and leaves a minimal amount of fragrance on your skin
  • ECONOMICAL FACIAL MOISTURIZER: While many moisturizers come with a hefty price tag, this moisturizer for face doesn’t break the bank; small and compact you can also easily take this with you when you travel in your cosmetic bag that is stowed in your regular luggage
  • EVERY DAY USE MOISTURIZER: The Bella Linda Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion ingredients are gentle enough for everyday skin care use that nourishes and hydrates but won’t strip or over hydrate the skin; it’s an easy add on to your daily skin care routine and won’t not compete with any toner, serum, sunscreen or other beauty product that you’re already using

  • MPN: HEBL65OZFC3PK

In addition, the Bella Linda Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion ingredients are gentle enough for everyday skincare; it nourishes and hydrates but won’t strip the skin of its natural oils or over hydrate. It’s an easy add on to your daily skincare routine and won’t compete with any toner, serum, sunscreen or other beauty product that you’re already using.

The facial moisturizer is also a winner because of its minimal fragrance. Given the number of grooming products we use on a daily basis like makeup, mouthwash, sunscreen, perfume and more, many of which can have a strong and lingering fragrance, this facial moisturizer is lightweight and leaves a minimal amount of fragrance on your skin

Moisturizers are an essential part of any skincare regimen and finding the right one can be tricky. If you’re looking for a simple, no-fuss, lightly scented moisturizer, the Bella Linda Skin Care Face Moisturizer Cream Lotion provides excellent hydration without a hefty price tag or greasy leftover residue.
